name: JEDZA
title: THE WANDERER

abilities.name: Cradle the Spark
abilities.text: While this model has a Life token, enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

abilities.name: Fragility of Life
abilities.text: When a model is killed within LoS of this model, this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, an ally within 6" of this model may heal 2.

abilities.name: Midnight Crossing
abilities.text: When declaring non-general actions, this model may remove a Life token. If it does so, increase the Rg of the action by +10".

actions.name: In Death's Shadow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target allies. If the target is an ally, instead of being dealt damage, the target heals 2.

triggers.name: Pulse of Renewal
triggers.text: Once per turn. When resolving, allies within (aura)4" of the target heal 2.

triggers.name: Gift of Days
triggers.text: Enemy only. When resolving, this model and the target heal 1.

actions.name: A Weary Road
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Other friendly model only. Move the target up to 3", then make a Scheme marker in base contact with it.

triggers.name: Wayward Soul
triggers.text: Remove a Life token from the target. The target declares a general action.

actions.name: Ancient Lamps
actions.effects: Make a Lamp marker within range. An ally within 2" of the made marker may heal 1.

triggers.name: Refresh
triggers.text: Models within (aura)2" of the made marker heal 1.

triggers.name: Magician's Secret
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the made marker.

triggers.name: Stay a While and Listen
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Slow token.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='THE WANDERER' back='The Wanderer'
extraction_notes: Eternal Pilgrimage ability name is visible but ability text is not shown on this card front
Health bar shows numbered pips from 0-12, total health is 12
